componentDescription: Manages a list of interactive tags, allowing users to add, remove, and display them.

id.description: A unique identifier for the input element.

name.description: The name attribute for the input element, useful for form submissions.

label.description: The text label displayed above or alongside the input field.

helperText.description: Text displayed below the input field to provide additional guidance or information.

error.description: An error message or a boolean indicating that the input is in an error state.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed inside the input field when it is empty.
placeholder.defaultValue: 'Type and press Enter to add tags...'

tags.description: An array of strings representing the controlled tags within the input.

defaultTags.description: An array of strings representing the initial uncontrolled tags for the input.

onTagsChange.description: Callback function invoked when the array of tags changes, providing the updated tags.

onTagAdd.description: Callback function invoked when a new tag is successfully added to the input.

onTagRemove.description: Callback function invoked when a tag is removed, providing the tag content and its index.

maxTags.description: The maximum number of tags allowed in the input field.

minTagLength.description: The minimum character length required for a tag to be valid.

maxTagLength.description: The maximum character length allowed for a tag.

allowDuplicates.description: Boolean indicating whether duplicate tags are allowed to be added.

separators.description: An array of characters or keys that trigger the creation of a new tag.

isDisabled.description: Boolean indicating whether the input and tags are disabled.

isReadOnly.description: Boolean indicating whether the input field is read-only.

isAutoFocus.description: Boolean indicating whether the input field should automatically gain focus on mount.

isRemovable.description: Boolean indicating whether individual tags can be removed by the user.

size.description: Defines the visual size of the TagInput component.

shape.description: Defines the visual shape (e.g., rounded corners) of the TagInput component.

variant.description: Defines the visual variant or style of the TagInput component.

shadow.description: Defines the shadow style applied to the TagInput component.

views.description: Custom styles applied to different parts of the TagInput component.

left.description: A React node to be rendered on the left side of the input field.

right.description: A React node to be rendered on the right side of the input field.

onFocus.description: Callback function invoked when the input field receives focus.

onBlur.description: Callback function invoked when the input field loses focus.

onClick.description: Callback function invoked when the input field is clicked.

menuItems.description: An array of strings to be displayed as selectable suggestions in a menu.

onMenuItemSelect.description: Callback function invoked when an item from the suggestion menu is selected.
